Container.Name: Whackamole
Container.Overview: Whackamole watches completed torrents from QUI and asks Upload Assistant whether matching tracker uploads are missing. It keeps a dashboard of recommended upload candidates and stores API keys encrypted in /config.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Whackamole configuration, encrypted secrets, and local queue database.

Config.Name: Media Root
Config.Description: Read-only media path that matches the Upload Assistant container view.

Config.Name: UA Temp
Config.Description: Read-only Upload Assistant temp path, used only when your UA workflow needs that mounted view.

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Internal config directory. Leave as /config unless you change the container path.
